title: Admin basics
summary: Reference for the main admin areas.

sections.title: Areas
sections.markdown:
- **Dashboard**: overview and status
- **Content**: saved items, drafts, and moderation
- **Composer**: writing and editing
- **Profile**: account, editor, and publishing preferences
- **System settings**: sitewide configuration
- **About**: version and platform information

sections.title: Theme mode
sections.markdown: Theme mode is set from the account menu. A browser override takes precedence over the saved user default.

sections.title: Layout checks
sections.markdown: Use the breakpoint badge in the top bar when reporting layout issues.
